description_long: This is a wooden chair with a high, ladder-style backrest featuring four horizontal slats, the uppermost and lowermost of which are darker than the two central slats. The seat is rectangular and upholstered in a dark brown material, likely faux leather or vinyl, showing some visible wear and discoloration. The chair stands on four straight, square-section wooden legs, with a horizontal support bar connecting the legs on each side for added stability. The overall design is simple and functional, with no armrests and a focus on practicality. The wood has a warm, reddish-brown finish, and the seat's surface appears slightly cushioned. This chair would be suitable for use in dining areas, waiting rooms, or public indoor spaces.
description: A wooden chair with a high ladder-back and a dark brown cushioned seat, showing some wear. It has a simple, functional design with four straight legs and no armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ladder-style backrest and the full width of the dark brown seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chair's depth, the thickness of the seat cushion, and the straight backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the four horizontal slats of the backrest and the back of the seat, with visible wear.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the seat's edge and the backrest's profile.
